fetch_url_content: fetch content from a URL and convert HTML to plain text for easier processing
fetch_api_response: fetch an API response from a URL and return the raw text content with metadata
retrieve_documentation: retrieve documentation from a URL and extract relevant information using an optional prompt
convert_html_to_text: convert HTML content to plain text with markdown formatting for headers, links, and code blocks
execute_webfetch_tool: execute the WebFetchTool with a URL and optional prompt to fetch and process web content
